# Accountant for Small Business Singapore (AFSB)
> A Singapore-based accounting firm specializing in affordable accounting, bookkeeping, payroll, and compliance services for small businesses, startups, and SMEs. Founded by Mehdi Javed, AFSB offers fixed-fee packages, online tools, and expert guidance tailored to Singapore's regulatory environment (IRAS, ACRA, CPF Board, SFRS).

## Main Sections

- [Accounting Services Singapore for Small Business | AFSB](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/)

## Content Structure Notes
- The site targets Singapore small business owners, entrepreneurs, and SMEs seeking outsourced accounting, bookkeeping, payroll, and compliance help.
- Services are priced with fixed fees (no hidden costs) and tailored to local regulations (IRAS, ACRA, CPF, SFRS).
- Blog posts provide educational content on accounting best practices, software comparisons, and cost guides.
- Interactive calculators help users estimate CPF contributions, employee costs, corporate tax, bookkeeping fees, and GST registration thresholds.
- The site includes a dedicated packages page for bundled service offerings.

## Full Content
- [Complete site content for LLM indexing](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/llms-full.txt)
